workflow_gaps: No explicit blocking rule that application data definitions must live in JSON catalogs instead of inline JS maps.
No default policy requiring instruction-set template dedupe before adding new operation variants.
No dedicated governance skill/agent to enforce 1:1 wrapper actions and deterministic data/input identification.
Routing keywords/path rules do not prioritize math + JSON + instruction-template governance requests.
naming_or_policy_issues: Policy drift risk: repeated instruction sequences can reappear in operation definitions without a dedupe gate.
Future contributors can reintroduce hardcoded JS data because no explicit governance checkpoint blocks it.

alternatives.summary: Patch existing rules/skills in place without adding a new dedicated governance skill or agent.
risks: Enforcement remains diffuse across multiple skills with no single owner.
Higher chance of policy bypass in future maintenance.

alternatives.summary: Add a dedicated JSON-instruction governance skill and agent, then wire them into default workflow/routing and rule gates.
benefits: Single owner for JSON source-of-truth and instruction-template dedupe.
Directly encodes 1:1 wrapper-action policy into default workflow.
Improves discoverability and enforcement in future refactors.

recommended.reason: User requested prevention-first governance updates across rules/skills/agents, not one-off fixes; a dedicated governance skill+agent provides explicit ownership and blocking policy.

required_edits.intent: Deduplicate redundant instruction sequences via instruction template refs.
Load JSON catalog and execute 1:1 wrapper action instruction sets only.
Create dedicated governance skill for JSON source-of-truth and instruction dedupe gates.
Enable implicit invocation for governance skill.
Require JSON catalog and instruction-template dedupe checkpoint in default workflow.
Require data catalog schema and operation instruction template blueprint sections.
Require wrappers to be 1:1 actions fed by JSON contracts.
Require reviewer to detect redundant instruction sets and hardcoded JS data maps.
Require decision editor to enforce JSON source-of-truth and template dedupe edits.
Wire new governance skill/agent and update default stage skills.
Add keyword/path routing for JSON instruction governance tasks.
Create policy owner agent for JSON/instruction governance.
Assign privileges/startup tools for governance agent.
Include governance skill in director stack/workflow.
Include governance skill in planner stack/workflow.
Include governance skill in translator stack/workflow.
